MetricCard.description: Displays a single KPI metric with label, value, optional unit, and optional trend indicator. Dispatches a ci-action CustomEvent on click.

componentId.description: Unique identifier for the component instance, echoed back in ci-action events.

label.description: Metric label displayed in uppercase above the value (e.g. 'Total Sessions').

value.description: Primary metric value to display (string or number).

unit.description: Optional unit suffix displayed next to the value (e.g. 'ms', '%').

trendLabel.description: Optional text displayed inside the trend pill (e.g. '+12%').

onCiAction.description: Event handler called when the component dispatches a ci-action event. Receives the CustomEvent as its argument.

DataTable.description: Sortable paginated data table. Supports ascending/descending sort on any column marked sortable. Dispatches a ci-action CustomEvent on row click.

componentId.description: Unique identifier for the component instance, echoed back in ci-action events.

columns.description: Array of column definitions. Each entry: { key: string, label: string, sortable?: boolean }.

rows.description: Array of row data objects. Each object's keys should match the column key values.

pageSize.description: Maximum number of rows to display at once (default 50).

onCiAction.description: Event handler called when the component dispatches a ci-action event. Receives the CustomEvent as its argument.

DotDiagram.description: Renders a Graphviz DOT source string to SVG using @hpcc-js/wasm-graphviz. WASM is loaded lazily on first render.

componentId.description: Unique identifier for the component instance.

source.description: Graphviz DOT language source string to render (e.g. 'digraph G { a -> b; }').

engine.description: Graphviz layout engine to use (default 'dot'). Options: dot, neato, fdp, sfdp, twopi, circo.

StatChart.description: Renders bar charts, pie charts, and histograms using Plotly.js. Plotly is loaded lazily on first render. Dispatches a ci-action CustomEvent on plot click.

componentId.description: Unique identifier for the component instance, echoed back in ci-action events.

traces.description: Array of Plotly trace objects. Each trace defines type ('bar', 'pie', 'histogram'), x/y data arrays, and other Plotly trace properties.

layout.description: Plotly layout object for chart titles, axis labels, legend, and other display options. Dark theme defaults are applied automatically.

onCiAction.description: Event handler called when the component dispatches a ci-action event. Receives the CustomEvent as its argument.

TimeseriesChart.description: Renders time-based line/scatter charts using Plotly.js with WebGL traces for large datasets. Plotly is loaded lazily on first render. Dispatches a ci-action CustomEvent on plot click.

componentId.description: Unique identifier for the component instance, echoed back in ci-action events.

traces.description: Array of Plotly trace objects. Trace types are automatically mapped to WebGL equivalents (scatter → scattergl) for performance. Each trace should include x (timestamps) and y (values) arrays.

layout.description: Plotly layout object. xaxis.type defaults to 'date'. Dark theme defaults and gridlines are applied automatically.

onCiAction.description: Event handler called when the component dispatches a ci-action event. Receives the CustomEvent as its argument.

NetworkGraph.description: Renders an interactive network graph using Cytoscape.js. Cytoscape is loaded lazily on first render. Dispatches a ci-action CustomEvent on node click.

componentId.description: Unique identifier for the component instance, echoed back in ci-action events.

elements.description: Graph elements object with shape { nodes: Array<{ data: Record<string,unknown>, classes?: string }>, edges: Array<{ data: Record<string,unknown>, classes?: string }> }. Node data should include 'id' and optionally 'label'.

layout.description: Cytoscape layout algorithm name (default 'cose'). Options include: cose, circle, grid, breadthfirst, concentric, dagre.

onCiAction.description: Event handler called when the component dispatches a ci-action event. Receives the CustomEvent as its argument.
